name: Beijing Xinleineng Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Xinleineng Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells power supply products in China and internationally. The company primarily offers DC-DC converters, AC-DC converters, DC-AC converters, rectifiers and high-power supply products, custom power supply products, primary and embedded power products, filters, etc. It provides power devices and power systems primarily for communication, railway, electric, industrial control, new energy resources fields, etc. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
